project1.title: Loan and Agreement Sync Platform
project1.description: Developed a comprehensive enterprise microservices platform that seamlessly integrates Salesforce nCino Bulk API with Enterprise Data Warehouse for real-time loan data synchronization.
details: Architected scalable Spring Boot microservices handling 50,000+ daily transactions
Implemented robust error handling and retry mechanisms for API integration
Designed PostgreSQL database schema optimized for high-volume data processing
Developed RESTful APIs for internal application consumption
Integrated AWS CloudWatch for monitoring and alerting
Achieved 99.9% uptime and reduced data sync latency by 60%
project1.impact: Reduced manual data reconciliation efforts by 80% and improved loan processing efficiency across the organization.

project2.title: AWS Cloud Migration Dashboard
project2.description: Built a comprehensive React-based dashboard application for visualizing real-time cloud migration metrics and resource utilization across multiple AWS accounts.
details: Developed responsive React frontend with Redux for state management
Implemented AWS Lambda functions for real-time data aggregation
Utilized DynamoDB for scalable, low-latency data storage
Integrated CloudWatch metrics and custom monitoring solutions
Created interactive charts and visualizations using D3.js
Implemented authentication using AWS Cognito
project2.impact: Provided real-time visibility into migration progress, reducing migration timeline by 25% through data-driven decision making.

project3.title: QA Automation Framework for Microservices
project3.description: Designed and implemented a comprehensive hybrid testing framework combining Selenium and TestNG for automated testing of microservices architecture.
details: Built modular test automation framework supporting UI and API testing
Integrated with Jenkins CI/CD pipeline for automated test execution
Implemented parallel test execution using Selenium Grid
Created detailed test reports with screenshots and logs
Dockerized test environment for consistent execution
Reduced regression testing time from 3 days to 8 hours
project3.impact: Increased test coverage by 75% and reduced production defects by 60% through early detection of issues.

project4.title: Portfolio Website Platform
project4.description: Modern, performant portfolio website built with React and Next.js, featuring integrated blog, analytics dashboard, and automated deployment pipeline.
details: Developed with Next.js for optimal performance and SEO
Implemented MDX for rich blog content with code highlighting
Integrated Google Analytics for visitor tracking
Automated deployment to Vercel with GitHub Actions
Achieved 95+ Lighthouse score across all metrics
Implemented dark mode and responsive design
project4.impact: Created a reusable template for developers to showcase their work, with 500+ stars on GitHub.
